EmailTemplate.description: Follow up email to Public Liability claim.
EmailTemplate.name: FNOL to Insured – Public Liability
EmailTemplate.subject: Information required to support claims process
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
(Use for those who notified us) Thank you for your speaking with me today and for notifying us of a new potential Public Liability claim.
(Use for those where we received notification) We have received notification of a potential claim being made against you for (insert allegations and claimant here).
In order that we can present a claim to insurers, please could you forward me the following:
- Overview of events to date leading up to the claim - Description of the damage done and cost expected as far as you know - Description of how the damage was caused - The date of when the incident occurred and when the claim was made against you - Statement from the claimant or as much detail as you can - Explain if you know, their view of responsibility - Confirmation of any involvement of a further party such as client - Copies of any quote to do the work/agreement - Photographs to support the damage caused if you have any - Copies of any prior correspondence - Any other correspondence received - if applicable that you feel would support your potential claim - Confirmation of your VAT status
I attach your policy schedule and wording to assist.
Upon receipt of the above, I will send to our insurers for review. Depending on how quickly you return the information will determine the timeframe for this.
Please note should you make a Public Liability claim and this is accepted there will be a policy excess of (insert Excess/delete it not applicable) as per your schedule.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Claims Team
E: claims@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
